arrows.svg:
<svg class="handdraw-arrow arrow-animated" data-arrow-id="Key Concept" xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg" viewBox="0 0 150.08331019803634 25" style="overflow:visible;">
    <defs>
      <filter id="ink-bleed-arrow" x="-10%" y="-10%" width="120%" height="120%">
        <feTurbulence type="fractalNoise" baseFrequency="0.04" numOctaves="3" result="noise"/>
        <feDisplacementMap in="SourceGraphic" in2="noise" scale="2.2" xChannelSelector="R" yChannelSelector="G"/>
      </filter>
    </defs>
    <g transform="rotate(-1.9)" filter="url(#ink-bleed-arrow)">
      <!-- Arrow body (perfect-freehand style) -->
      <path d="M0.0,0.0 L35.0,-0.5 L70.0,-0.8 L105.1,-0.5 L140.1,-0.0" 
            stroke="oklch(0.72 0.165 80)" stroke-width="2.5" fill="none" stroke-linecap="round" 
            class="arrow-body" stroke-dasharray="150.08331019803634" stroke-dashoffset="150.08331019803634"/>
      <!-- Arrow head -->
      <path d="M140.08331019803634,-6 L152.08331019803634,0 L140.08331019803634,6" 
            stroke="oklch(0.72 0.165 80)" stroke-width="2" fill="none" stroke-linecap="round" stroke-linejoin="round"
            class="arrow-head"/>
      
      <text x="75.04165509901817" y="-12" fill="oklch(0.72 0.165 80)" font-size="10" font-family="var(--font-mono, monospace)" text-anchor="middle" opacity="0.7">Key Concept</text>
    </g>
  </svg>
arrows.label: Key Concept

arrows.svg:
<svg class="handdraw-arrow arrow-animated" data-arrow-id="Next Steps" xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg" viewBox="0 0 150.08331019803634 25" style="overflow:visible;">
    <defs>
      <filter id="ink-bleed-arrow" x="-10%" y="-10%" width="120%" height="120%">
        <feTurbulence type="fractalNoise" baseFrequency="0.04" numOctaves="3" result="noise"/>
        <feDisplacementMap in="SourceGraphic" in2="noise" scale="2.2" xChannelSelector="R" yChannelSelector="G"/>
      </filter>
    </defs>
    <g transform="rotate(-1.9)" filter="url(#ink-bleed-arrow)">
      <!-- Arrow body (perfect-freehand style) -->
      <path d="M0,0 L140.08331019803634,0" 
            stroke="oklch(0.72 0.165 80)" stroke-width="2.5" fill="none" stroke-linecap="round" 
            class="arrow-body" stroke-dasharray="150.08331019803634" stroke-dashoffset="150.08331019803634"/>
      <!-- Arrow head -->
      <path d="M140.08331019803634,-6 L152.08331019803634,0 L140.08331019803634,6" 
            stroke="oklch(0.72 0.165 80)" stroke-width="2" fill="none" stroke-linecap="round" stroke-linejoin="round"
            class="arrow-head"/>
      
      <text x="75.04165509901817" y="-12" fill="oklch(0.72 0.165 80)" font-size="10" font-family="var(--font-mono, monospace)" text-anchor="middle" opacity="0.7">Next Steps</text>
    </g>
  </svg>
arrows.label: Next Steps

bonecos.svg:
<svg viewBox="0 0 64 88" width="64" height="88" class="boneco-puppet boneco-teaching" data-boneco-id="undefined" xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg">
    <defs>
      <filter id="grain-boneco" x="-5%" y="-5%" width="110%" height="110%">
        <feTurbulence type="fractalNoise" baseFrequency="0.6" numOctaves="3" result="noise"/>
        <feColorMatrix type="saturate" values="0" in="noise" result="grayNoise"/>
        <feBlend in="SourceGraphic" in2="grayNoise" mode="multiply"/>
      </filter>
    </defs>
    
    <g filter="url(#grain-boneco)">
      <!-- Hair -->
      <ellipse cx="32" cy="16" rx="14" ry="10" fill="oklch(0.20 0.03 290)" opacity="0.9"/>
      <!-- Head -->
      <ellipse cx="32" cy="22" rx="12" ry="13" fill="oklch(0.82 0.07 65)"/>
      <!-- Eyes -->
      <ellipse cx="27" cy="20" rx="2" ry="3" fill="oklch(0.12 0.02 280)"/>
      <ellipse cx="37" cy="20" rx="2" ry="3" fill="oklch(0.12 0.02 280)"/>
      <!-- Eye highlights -->
      <circle cx="28" cy="19" r="1" fill="oklch(1 0 0 / 0.6)"/>
      <circle cx="38" cy="19" r="1" fill="oklch(1 0 0 / 0.6)"/>
      <!-- Eyebrows (for emotions) -->
      
      
      
      <!-- Mouth -->
      <path d="M27,27 Q32,30 37,27" stroke="oklch(0.12 0.02 280)" stroke-width="2" fill="none" stroke-linecap="round"/>
      <!-- Body -->
      <rect x="24" y="35" width="16" height="20" rx="3" fill="oklch(0.45 0.12 260 / 0.7)"/>
      <!-- Arms -->
      <path d="M24,38 L12,48" stroke="oklch(0.82 0.07 65)" stroke-width="4" stroke-linecap="round" fill="none"/>
      <path d="M36,36 L56,48" stroke="oklch(0.82 0.07 65)" stroke-width="3" stroke-linecap="round" fill="none"/>
      <path d="M40,38 L52,48" stroke="oklch(0.82 0.07 65)" stroke-width="4" stroke-linecap="round" fill="none"/>
      <!-- Legs -->
      <path d="M27,55 L22,70" stroke="oklch(0.82 0.07 65)" stroke-width="4" stroke-linecap="round" fill="none"/>
      <path d="M37,55 L42,70" stroke="oklch(0.82 0.07 65)" stroke-width="4" stroke-linecap="round" fill="none"/>
    </g>
  </svg>

teachImages.svg:
<svg viewBox="0 0 200 160" width="200" height="160" class="teach-image-svg" data-teach-id="undefined" xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg" style="transform:rotate(-0.09310522308426128deg);filter:drop-shadow(0 2px 6px oklch(0 0 0 / 0.12))">
    <defs>
      <filter id="grain-teach" x="-5%" y="-5%" width="110%" height="110%">
        <feTurbulence type="fractalNoise" baseFrequency="0.8" numOctaves="3" result="noise"/>
        <feColorMatrix type="saturate" values="0" in="noise" result="grayNoise"/>
        <feBlend in="SourceGraphic" in2="grayNoise" mode="multiply"/>
      </filter>
      <clipPath id="img-clip-undefined">
        <rect x="4" y="4" width="192" height="148" rx="2"/>
      </clipPath>
    </defs>
    <g filter="url(#grain-teach)">
      <!-- Polaroid/paper background -->
      <rect x="0" y="0" width="200" height="160" rx="3" fill="oklch(0.98 0.01 80 / 0.92)" stroke="oklch(0.88 0.02 80 / 0.5)" stroke-width="0.5"/>
      
      <!-- Image area -->
      <rect x="4" y="4" width="192" height="148" rx="2" fill="url(#grad-undefined)"/>
           <defs>
             <linearGradient id="grad-undefined" x1="0" y1="0" x2="1" y2="1">
               <stop offset="0%" stop-color="oklch(0.72 0.165 80)"/>
               <stop offset="50%" stop-color="oklch(0.60 0.15 280)"/>
               <stop offset="100%" stop-color="oklch(0.55 0.12 200)"/>
             </linearGradient>
           </defs>
           <text x="100" y="66" fill="oklch(1 0 0 / 0.7)" font-size="24" text-anchor="middle">📖</text>
           <text x="100" y="92" fill="oklch(1 0 0 / 0.5)" font-size="10" text-anchor="middle" font-family="sans-serif">undefined</text>
      
      <!-- Caption / label area -->
      
      
      <!-- Tape strip at top -->
      <g transform="translate(60, -4) rotate(-2)">
        <rect x="0" y="0" width="80" height="24" rx="2" fill="oklch(0.88 0.14 85 / 0.5)" stroke="oklch(0.75 0.12 80 / 0.4)" stroke-width="0.5"/><line x1="10" y1="6" x2="70" y2="6" stroke="oklch(0.80 0.10 80 / 0.3)" stroke-width="0.5"/>
      </g>
    </g>
  </svg>
teachImages.label: magica-quickstart
